name: SHOPIFY INC.
summary: Shopify Inc. provides internet infrastructure for commerce through an all-in-one platform enabling merchants to start, run, and grow businesses. It offers subscription solutions (platform access, POS, themes, domains) and merchant solutions (payment processing, Shopify Payments, Shopify Balance, Shopify Capital, Shopify Shipping, Shopify Markets, and fulfillment services). As of December 31, 2025, millions of merchants from more than 175 countries use the platform across online storefronts, physical retail, social media, and AI platforms.

products.name: Shopify Platform
products.description: All-in-one multi-channel commerce platform for managing online and in-store sales.

products.name: Shopify Plus
products.description: Enterprise-tier subscription plan for large-volume brands and high-growth merchants.

products.name: Shopify POS
products.description: Point-of-sale solution for physical retail operations integrated with the Shopify platform.

products.name: Shopify Payments
products.description: Integrated payment processing solution allowing merchants to accept payments directly.

products.name: Shopify Capital
products.description: Lending and financing products providing merchants with access to business funding.

products.name: Shopify Balance
products.description: Financial account product offering merchants banking-like services.

products.name: Shopify Shipping
products.description: Shipping solution providing merchants with discounted rates and label printing.

products.name: Shopify Markets
products.description: Tool enabling merchants to expand and sell internationally across multiple markets.

products.name: Shopify App Store
products.description: Marketplace with more than 21,000 apps extending Shopify platform functionality.

products.name: Shopify Fulfillment Network
products.description: Fulfillment and logistics service helping merchants store and ship products.

partnerships.description: Developers build and distribute apps via the Shopify App Store to extend platform functionality.
Partners create themes and drive merchant referrals as part of the Shopify partner ecosystem.
Marketers, photographers and service partners support merchants within the Shopify ecosystem.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
origin.keep_alive: Include this leaf as parent when citing this data. Verify freshness at the verify URL.
